examples: They either sell a product at a given price or discontinue it.
Labour likewise wants to discontinue local planning where councils oppose development.
If the attrition problem cannot be successfully addressed, Hachnut should discontinue the sponsorship program.
Cognizant of past fiascoes, the GAO strongly makes the argument to discontinue the paper dollar.
JetBlue said it will discontinue its two daily flights between Newark and Tampa in May.
